title: OLS4 term grounding (SQL-native via ducknng_ncurl)
description: A metacurator-shaped grounding skill (disambiguate: a text term -> one CURIE or abstain, https://github.com/seandavi/metacurator), SQL all the way down. The HTTP fetch is ducknng_ncurl_table — a SQL table function — so there is NO TS resolver: the URL is composed in SQL (getvariable + url_encode), agent params are DuckDB session variables, and the JSON response is parsed into a table by ducknng. The host provisions ducknng (duckdbInitSql: INSTALL ducknng FROM community; LOAD ducknng; and a TLS config for HTTPS) and the agent supplies {query}. NOT a ClawBio skill (ClawBio has no OLS skill); the named concrete is metacurator's disambiguate. http.get (TS) is the fallback when a DuckDB version has no ducknng build.

resolvers.title: SQL materialize
resolvers.description: Materialize a table from a read-only SELECT (here, a ducknng_ncurl_table HTTP fetch).

params.sql: SELECT * FROM ducknng_ncurl_table(coalesce(getvariable('ols4_base'), 'https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols4/api') || '/search?q=' || url_encode(getvariable('query')) || '&ontology=' || url_encode(coalesce(getvariable('ontology'), 'mondo')) || '&fieldList=obo_id,label', 'GET', NULL, NULL, 20000, coalesce(getvariable('tls'), 0)::UBIGINT)
